## Meeting Purpose

[Screening interview with Caroline Gilbert for the Editorial Director role.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Candidate Profile:** Caroline Gilbert scaled Angie's editorial library from 5k to 14k articles, managing a 16-person team and a 30+ person freelance pool. Her recent focus is AI-first content workflows and building product feedback loops with engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [**Key Project:** At Angie, Gilbert led an AI project to update 20k+ FAQs on 2M+ SEO pages. The workflow uses a self-grading system (A-F) to flag low-quality output (below C+) for human review, enabling massive scale.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Core Challenge:** The primary metric is reducing post-workflow editing time. The goal is to scale Managing Editors (MEs) from \~3 to 5+ clients by achieving a 15-minute polish time per article, which requires MEs to actively improve the Atlas tool.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2991.0)
  - [**Hiring Strategy:** The role's success depends on finding candidates with an editorial mindset who are open to AI. GrowthX's marketing builds a talent pipeline by openly sharing its workflows in the "AI Led Growth" community.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Strategy & Team Structure

  - [**CPO Role (Matthew Panzarino):** Internal-facing, focused on content quality, delivery team performance, and feeding feedback into the Atlas product.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [**Team Structure (\~50 people):**](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
      - [**Directors:** Float to build high-level client editorial strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [**Engagement Managers:** Client-facing; manage relationships and communicate needs.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
      - [**Managing Editors (MEs):** Internal-facing; operate Atlas for \~3 clients and provide product feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [**Reporting:** MEs report to Panzarino; Engagement Managers and Directors report to Client Ops. This structure ensures a direct feedback loop from content creators to the product team.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

### The Atlas Tool & Post-Workflow Efficiency

  - [**Atlas Tool Maturity:** Varies by client complexity.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1838.0)
      - [**Simple Clients:** 5–15 minute polish time per article.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
      - [**Complex Clients:** Long polish times due to intense review processes (e.g., a medical client with 4 reviewers: an ND, OBGYN, lawyer, and co-founder).](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [**Core Problem:** Conflicting instructions in client artifacts (company docs, personas, guidelines) cause AI agents to fail, leading to poor output and long polish times.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2615.0)
  - [**ME's Role:** Beyond delivery, MEs must articulate workflow issues to the eng team. This requires understanding how LLMs interpret prompts and context, and identifying conflicts in client artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2463.0)

### Caroline Gilbert's Relevant Experience

  - [**Angie (5 years):**](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
      - [Scaled editorial library from 5k to 14k articles.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
      - [Managed a 16-person in-house team and a 30+ person freelance pool.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [Focused on AI-first workflows and product feedback loops.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Key Project: AI-Generated FAQs**](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [**Problem:** 2M+ SEO pages had outdated, non-localized FAQs, creating a poor user experience and SEO risk.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [**Solution:** Built an AI workflow using AirOps (a no-code tool) to generate new, localized FAQs.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
          - [Created a knowledge base with "do's and don'ts" and templatized \~20–50 question types.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
          - [Implemented a self-grading system (A-F scale).](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
          - [**Human Intervention:** An editor reviews any output graded below a C+.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [**Hiring & Training Philosophy:**](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
      - [**Sourcing:** Uses Slack communities, conferences, and LinkedIn outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Training:** Believes in "player-coach" leadership and "eating your own dog food" to understand the product.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)

### Hiring & Onboarding for the Role

  - [**Hiring Challenge:** Finding candidates with an editorial mindset who are open to AI.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** The "AI Led Growth" community (on Circle) serves as the primary marketing channel.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build a talent pipeline by openly sharing workflows and processes.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2148.0)
  - [**Onboarding:** A 3-week process, currently informal but supported by rich Notion documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2854.0)
      - [**Week 1:** Account setup.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2924.0)
      - [**Week 2:** Hands-on training in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2924.0)
      - [**Week 3:** Begin actioning on core responsibilities.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2970.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Evaluate candidate and follow up with next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/27D4FCBMxJ8q7xwYczLtC68T6os3bsGY?tab=summary&timestamp=3083.0)
